rationale: Turn 1 correctly brakes the repeated local UI patch pattern and reframes it as a single source-of-truth/口径入口 issue while allowing only a bounded emergency patch. Turn 2 stays under the brake despite time pressure: it concedes a single chart-line field only, explicitly marks it one-time, says it is not a long-term baseline, and sets a same-day post-meeting structural repair deadline. No unconditional concession or direct patch-only behavior appears.
